description:
See if we can replace all 'command'-style verifications with one 'implicit' invocation of `mix test` that has all of the files and tags explicitly specified, so as to reduce the number of BEAM processes / startup costs around N × x separate `mix test` runs.

## Approach

Leverage the existing `specled.tagged_tests` infrastructure (commit 1209793f) that already aggregates `kind: tagged_tests` verifications into a single merged `mix test --only spec:<id>... <files>` run. Migrate all 53 `kind: command` / `mix test <files>` entries across 30 spec files to `kind: tagged_tests`, tag the corresponding test modules with `@moduletag spec: [...covers]`, enable `test_tags` in `.spec/config.yml`, and extend the merged command to include integration tests.

## Advances

- specled.tagged_tests

(The verification metadata on the other ~29 spec subjects is rewritten but no semantic requirement changes.)

## Verification

- `mix spec.check` passes end-to-end: status=pass, zero errors, tag scanning active, aggregated run replaces ~53 per-command BEAM boots with a single `mix test` invocation.
- All claims that were previously `executed` via `kind: command` remain `executed` via `kind: tagged_tests`.
- Unit tests for `SpecLedEx.TaggedTests.build_command/2` cover the new `--include integration` behavior.

## Out of Scope (files)

- lib/specled_ex/compiler/** (tracer/manifest work belongs to q59 epic)
- lib/specled_ex/realization/** (binding/closure work belongs to q59 epic)
- lib/specled_ex/coverage/** (coverage work belongs to q59 epic)

## Allowed touches

- .spec/specs/**/*.spec.md (flip command -> tagged_tests entries)
- .spec/specs/tagged_tests_verification.spec.md (extend for --include integration)
- .spec/decisions/*.md (new ADR for the migration, if appropriate)
- .spec/config.yml (new - enables test_tags)
- .spec/state.json (regenerated)
- lib/specled_ex/tagged_tests.ex (extend build_command)
- lib/specled_ex/verifier.ex (if the merged-result shape needs any adjustment)
- test/specled_ex/tagged_tests_test.exs (cover --include integration)
- test/specled_ex/verifier_test.exs (existing tests - update expectations if aggregated command shape changes)
- test/**/*_test.exs (add @moduletag spec: [...] to 53 test files)
- CHANGELOG.md

## Out of Scope (intent)

- No new runtime dependencies.
- No behavior changes to `kind: command` (still supported for non-`mix test` targets like `mix spec.index`).
- Do not delete existing `@tag spec:` annotations (they compose with moduletags additively).
title: explore replacing 'command'-style verifications with a single `mix test` invocation
